description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized airplane with a sleek, dark blue fuselage and glowing cyan accents along its wings and circular engine housings. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each ending in a large, circular structure with illuminated rings, suggesting advanced propulsion or lift technology. The cockpit is open and centrally located, featuring a single seat with a visible control stick and a streamlined headrest. The tail section is minimalistic, with a small vertical stabilizer and no traditional horizontal stabilizers, giving it a unique silhouette. The landing gear is not visible, implying either a retractable or non-traditional configuration. The overall design is modern and aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and a high-tech aesthetic.
description: A sleek, futuristic dark blue airplane with glowing cyan accents, mid-mounted straight wings, and large circular engine housings. It features an open single-seat cockpit and a minimalistic tail design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular engine housings at the wingtips and the illuminated nose section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open cockpit, single seat, and the streamlined fuselage profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the minimalistic tail and the symmetry of the circular engine housings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit and the glowing accents on the wings and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and large circular structures at the wingtips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin electric engines integrated into circular wingtip housings.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalistic tail with a single small vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit centrally located on the fuselage with a streamlined headrest.
